Author: forteddyt
Name: GoodGlam
Punchline: Know when a dungeon drop is glam-worthy before you roll.
Description: Watches the Need/Greed roll window and notifies you when a rollable item is used in a popular glamour on Eorzea Collection, so you can decide whether to roll Need/Greed.
FeedbackMessage: Bug reports and feature requests are welcome. Use Report Bug or Suggest Feature in GoodGlam's About tab to open the matching GitHub form.
